creator: xpupulonx@gmail.com
text: The dtterm documentation [https://man.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=dtterm&sektion=5] shows incorrect escape sequences for  F34 (R14) and F35 (R15) (at the bottom, under "Sun Function Keys").  They are shown as "ESC [ 1 2 1 z" and "ESC [ 1 2 2 z" respectively.  According to the termcap database, these should be "ESC [ 2 2 1 z" and "ESC [ 2 2 2 z" respectively.  This would also make them consistent with the immediately preceding F(R) keys.
